channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: ChatGPT has delayed the roll out of its adult mode again: 'Getting the experience right will take more time'
item.description: We're going to be waiting a while yet for the promised adult mode to make an appearance in ChatGPT.

item.title: Test JBL Quantum 250 : un casque complet à prix maîtrisé
item.description: JBL poursuit le développement de sa gamme de casques dédiés au gaming avec le Quantum 250, un modèle filaire d’entrée de gamme au design original et embarquant des composants remplaçables.

item.title: Cette batterie Anker (20 100 mAh, 220 W) recharge tous les appareils à la vitesse de l’éclair pour 20 % de moins chez Amazon
item.description: Avec l'Anker Prime, vous ne tomberez jamais à court de batterie. Grâce à son petit format, elle peut s'emporter partout, même dans l'avion. En ce moment, elle est disponible chez Amazon pour 119,99 euros.

item.title: The cute and cursed story of Furby
item.description: The hottest toy of 1998 was sort of adorable, and sort of annoying. It couldn't do much - couldn't do anything, really - but it could look at you, it could say some nonsense phrases, and it seemed uncannily aware of the world around it. That's all Furby needed to pretty much take over the […]

item.title: There's a sneaky way to watch T20 World Cup Final 2026 for free
item.description: We've found a sneaky way you can watch the T20 World Cup Final 2026 from anywhere in the world, as defending champions India take on New Zealand.

item.title: Vinted : une nouvelle arnaque générée par l’IA fait des ravages
item.description: La célèbre plateforme de vente de seconde main fait face à une vague d'escroqueries d'un genre totalement inédit. Des acheteurs malveillants utilisent désormais des générateurs d'images pour simuler la réception de colis endommagés et obtenir des remboursements abusifs aux frais des vendeurs.

item.title: The uncomfortable truth about hybrid vehicles
item.description: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on the EV struggle, follow Andrew J. Hawkins. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started Apologies to the Toyota Prius, but the first hybrid vehicle […]

item.title: Want an iPhone 17e? Here's why the initial preorders phase is crucial for maximizing value
item.description: If you're thinking about upgrading, it could pay dividends to do it before Wednesday as preorder deals are usually stronger than those that come later.

item.title: 'Apple has dug a hole for itself': why the iPhone 17e has been overshadowed by the Nothing Phone (4a)
item.description: It's been a huge week for mid-range smartphones — but one TechRadar writer explains why they think the iPhone 17e was completely eclipsed by its new Nothing rival.

item.title: Travel in China without the roaming shock thanks to Jetpac's China eSIM
item.description: Claim a 15% discount and get instant mobile data before your trip.
